query: Give me a complete overview of everything related to Arne.
reasoning: The query requires a comprehensive view of all information related to the entity 'Arne', necessitating the use of all available agents to gather relevant data from each system.

steps.task: Fetch all emails and calendar events involving Arne.
Retrieve CRM contacts and any associated leads, accounts, and opportunities related to Arne.
Gather all location and catalog item data linked to Arne.

synthesis: Aggregate the results from each step to provide a complete overview of all information related to Arne across emails, calendar events, CRM data, and location/catalog details.
